meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve can't scale projects (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Pricing Strategies to Scale Your Freelance Business
content.seo_description: Stop trading time for money. Learn how to architect scalable SaaS pricing models using Antigravity and Claude Code to maximize your freelance revenue.
content.answer_block: To scale beyond billable hours, transition from custom development to productized SaaS tiers. By implementing automated billing logic with Antigravity and leveraging Claude Code for rapid feature iteration, you create a repeatable, high-margin asset that decouples your income from your time, allowing for exponential growth and client retention.
content.intro:
The ceiling on your income isn't your talent; it's your invoice. When you're trapped in the 'custom-build-for-one' cycle, you aren't building a business; you're building a digital sweatshop. Every line of code written for a single client is a missed opportunity to build a scalable, recurring revenue engine.

The shift happens when you stop selling labor and start selling access. By architecting your projects as modular SaaS products, you transform one-off deliverables into a subscription-based ecosystem. This isn't just about changing your rates—it's about re-engineering your entire delivery pipeline to favor automation and leverage.

steps.title: Define Tiered Value Propositions
steps.description: Identify the core features that drive client ROI and group them into three pricing tiers: Basic, Pro, and Enterprise.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project features and map them to a 3-tier SaaS pricing model that maximizes MRR while maintaining a low-friction entry point for initial clients.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Draft a pricing.json schema that supports tiered feature flagging for my current codebase.'

steps.title: Architect Feature-Gating Logic
steps.description: Implement a robust middleware layer that restricts access based on the user's active subscription tier.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular middleware component that checks user subscription status against a database of feature permissions. Ensure it is performant and secure.

steps.title: Automate Billing Integration
steps.description: Connect your application to Stripe using Antigravity to handle automated subscription lifecycle management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an automated Stripe integration module that handles subscription creation, webhooks for billing events, and tier upgrades/downgrades.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Integrate Stripe SDK to handle subscription webhooks and user status updates'

steps.title: Build a Self-Service Dashboard
steps.description: Create a client-facing UI where users can manage their own subscriptions without manual intervention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Tailwind/React dashboard component for subscription management, including an 'Upgrade Plan' button and current status display.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file 'src/components/Dashboard.tsx' --context 'Create a self-service subscription management UI'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate Scaling
steps.description: Deploy your updated architecture and use Claude Code to run automated tests that verify pricing tier constraints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an end-to-end test suite that simulates user interactions across all three pricing tiers to ensure feature gating works flawlessly.

pro_tips: Always offer an annual plan discount; it reduces churn and provides immediate cash flow for your next feature build.
Use 'usage-based' billing for your top-tier clients to capture value as their business grows alongside your product.
Never hardcode your pricing tiers; store them in a JSON config file so you can A/B test pricing without redeploying code.
Implement 'graceful degradation'—if a subscription expires, don't delete data, just restrict write access to keep the user in the ecosystem.
Leverage Claude Code's 'review' feature on your billing webhooks to catch edge cases in payment failures before they hit your production database.
content.next_steps: After implementing your pricing model, focus on creating a 'Usage Dashboard' that clearly demonstrates the ROI to your clients, justifying higher tiers over time.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for one and start building for many. By productizing your services, you unlock the ability to scale your income without scaling your hours. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
